flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Assumption University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Assumption University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.9k → $51.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Assumption University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.9k → $51.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Assumption University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
